verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt autem provinciæ filii, qui ascenderunt de captivitate, quam transtulerat Nabuchodonosor rex Babylonis in Babylonem, et reversi sunt in Jerusalem et Judam, unusquisque in civitatem suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣לֶּה ׀ בְּנֵ֣י הַמְּדִינָ֗ה הָֽעֹלִים֙ מִשְּׁבִ֣י הַגּוֹלָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶגְלָ֛ה (נבוכדנצור) [נְבוּכַדְנֶצַּ֥ר] מֶֽלֶךְ־בָּבֶ֖ל לְבָבֶ֑ל וַיָּשׁ֛וּבוּ לִירוּשָׁלַ֥͏ִם וִֽיהוּדָ֖ה אִ֥ישׁ לְעִירֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Now these are the children of the province that went up out of the captivity, of those which had been carried away, whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried away unto Babylon, and came again unto Jerusalem and Judah, every one unto his city;

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui venerunt cum Zorobabel, Josue, Nehemia, Saraia, Rahelaia, Mardochai, Belsan, Mesphar, Beguai, Rehum, Baana. Numerus virorum populi Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֣אוּ עִם־זְרֻבָּבֶ֗ל יֵשׁ֡וּעַ נְ֠חֶמְיָ֠ה שְׂרָיָ֨ה רְֽעֵלָיָ֜ה מׇרְדֳּכַ֥י בִּלְשָׁ֛ן מִסְפָּ֥ר בִּגְוַ֖י רְח֣וּם בַּעֲנָ֑ה מִסְפַּ֕ר אַנְשֵׁ֖י עַ֥ם יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Which came with Zerubbabel: Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, Baanah. The number of the men of the people of Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Pharos duo millia centum septuaginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י פַרְעֹ֔שׁ אַלְפַּ֕יִם מֵאָ֖ה שִׁבְעִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Parosh, two thousand an hundred seventy and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Sephatia, trecenti septuaginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י שְׁפַטְיָ֔ה שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת שִׁבְעִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Shephatiah, three hundred seventy and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Area, septingenti septuaginta quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י אָרַ֔ח שְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת חֲמִשָּׁ֥ה וְשִׁבְעִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Arah, seven hundred seventy and five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Phahath Moab, filiorum Josue : Joab, duo millia octingenti duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵֽי־פַחַ֥ת מוֹאָ֛ב לִבְנֵ֥י יֵשׁ֖וּעַ יוֹאָ֑ב אַלְפַּ֕יִם שְׁמֹנֶ֥ה מֵא֖וֹת וּשְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Pahath–moab, of the children of Jeshua and Joab, two thousand eight hundred and twelve.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Ælam, mille ducenti quinquaginta quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י עֵילָ֔ם אֶ֕לֶף מָאתַ֖יִם חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Elam, a thousand two hundred fifty and four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Zethua, nongenti quadraginta quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י זַתּ֔וּא תְּשַׁ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת וְאַרְבָּעִ֥ים וַחֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Zattu, nine hundred forty and five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Zachai, septingenti sexaginta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י זַכָּ֔י שְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת וְשִׁשִּֽׁים׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Zaccai, seven hundred and threescore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Bani, sexcenti quadraginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י בָנִ֔י שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת אַרְבָּעִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Bani, six hundred forty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Bebai, sexcenti viginti tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י בֵבָ֔י שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Bebai, six hundred twenty and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Azgad, mille ducenti viginti duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י עַזְגָּ֔ד אֶ֕לֶף מָאתַ֖יִם עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Azgad, a thousand two hundred twenty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Adonicam, sexcenti sexaginta sex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי֙ אֲדֹ֣נִיקָ֔ם שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת שִׁשִּׁ֥ים וְשִׁשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Adonikam, six hundred sixty and six.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Beguai, duo millia quinquaginta sex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י בִגְוָ֔י אַלְפַּ֖יִם חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וְשִׁשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Bigvai, two thousand fifty and six.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Adin, quadringenti quinquaginta quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י עָדִ֔ין אַרְבַּ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Adin, four hundred fifty and four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Ather, qui erant ex Ezechia, nonaginta octo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵֽי־אָטֵ֥ר לִֽיחִזְקִיָּ֖ה תִּשְׁעִ֥ים וּשְׁמֹנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Ater of Hezekiah, ninety and eight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Besai, trecenti viginti tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י בֵצָ֔י שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Bezai, three hundred twenty and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Jora, centum duodecim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י יוֹרָ֔ה מֵאָ֖ה וּשְׁנֵ֥ים עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Jorah, an hundred and twelve.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Hasum, ducenti viginti tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י חָשֻׁ֔ם מָאתַ֖יִם עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Hashum, two hundred twenty and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Gebbar, nonaginta quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י גִבָּ֖ר תִּשְׁעִ֥ים וַחֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Gibbar, ninety and five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Bethlehem, centum viginti tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י בֵֽית־לָ֔חֶם מֵאָ֖ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Beth–lehem, an hundred twenty and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri Netupha, quinquaginta sex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַנְשֵׁ֥י נְטֹפָ֖ה חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וְשִׁשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The men of Netophah, fifty and six.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri Anathoth, centum viginti octo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַנְשֵׁ֣י עֲנָת֔וֹת מֵאָ֖ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁמֹנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The men of Anathoth, an hundred twenty and eight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Azmaveth, quadraginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י עַזְמָ֖וֶת אַרְבָּעִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Azmaveth, forty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Cariathiarim, Cephira et Beroth, septingenti quadraginta tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֨י קִרְיַ֤ת עָרִים֙ כְּפִירָ֣ה וּבְאֵר֔וֹת שְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת וְאַרְבָּעִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Kirjath–arim, Chephirah, and Beeroth, seven hundred and forty and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Rama et Gabaa, sexcenti viginti unus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֤י הָרָמָה֙ וָגָ֔בַע שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאֶחָֽד׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Ramah and Gaba, six hundred twenty and one.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri Machmas, centum viginti duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַנְשֵׁ֣י מִכְמָ֔ס מֵאָ֖ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The men of Michmas, an hundred twenty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viri Bethel et Hai, ducenti viginti tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַנְשֵׁ֤י בֵֽית־אֵל֙ וְהָעָ֔י מָאתַ֖יִם עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The men of Beth–el and Ai, two hundred twenty and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Nebo, quinquaginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י נְב֖וֹ חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Nebo, fifty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Megbis, centum quinquaginta sex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י מַגְבִּ֔ישׁ מֵאָ֖ה חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וְשִׁשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Magbish, an hundred fifty and six.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Ælam alterius, mille ducenti quinquaginta quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי֙ עֵילָ֣ם אַחֵ֔ר אֶ֕לֶף מָאתַ֖יִם חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of the other Elam, a thousand two hundred fifty and four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Harim, trecenti viginti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י חָרִ֔ם שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת וְעֶשְׂרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Harim, three hundred and twenty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Lod Hadid, et Ono, septingenti viginti quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־לֹד֙ חָדִ֣יד וְאוֹנ֔וֹ שְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וַחֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Lod, Hadid, and Ono, seven hundred twenty and five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Jericho, trecenti quadraginta quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י יְרֵח֔וֹ שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת אַרְבָּעִ֥ים וַחֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Jericho, three hundred forty and five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Senaa, tria millia sexcenti triginta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י סְנָאָ֔ה שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת אֲלָפִ֔ים וְשֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת וּשְׁלֹשִֽׁים׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Senaah, three thousand and six hundred and thirty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sacerdotes : filii Jadaia in domo Josue, nongenti septuaginta tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽכֹּהֲנִ֑ים {פ}בְּנֵ֤י יְדַֽעְיָה֙ לְבֵ֣ית יֵשׁ֔וּעַ תְּשַׁ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת שִׁבְעִ֥ים וּשְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The priests: the children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua, nine hundred seventy and three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Emmer, mille quinquaginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י אִמֵּ֔ר אֶ֖לֶף חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Immer, a thousand fifty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Pheshur, mille ducenti quadraginta septem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י פַשְׁח֔וּר אֶ֕לֶף מָאתַ֖יִם אַרְבָּעִ֥ים וְשִׁבְעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Pashur, a thousand two hundred forty and seven.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Harim, mille decem et septem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י חָרִ֔ם אֶ֖לֶף וְשִׁבְעָ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Harim, a thousand and seventeen.

verses.latin_vulgate: Levitæ : filii Josue et Cedmihel filiorum Odoviæ, septuaginta quatuor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַלְוִיִּ֑ם בְּנֵי־יֵשׁ֧וּעַ וְקַדְמִיאֵ֛ל לִבְנֵ֥י הוֹדַוְיָ֖ה שִׁבְעִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The Levites: the children of Jeshua and Kadmiel, of the children of Hodaviah, seventy and four.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantores : filii Asaph, centum viginti octo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽמְשֹׁרְרִ֑ים בְּנֵ֣י אָסָ֔ף מֵאָ֖ה עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁמֹנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The singers: the children of Asaph, an hundred twenty and eight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii janitorum : filii Sellum, filii Ater, filii Telmon, filii Accub, filii Hatitha, filii Sobai : universi centum triginta novem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֣י הַשֹּֽׁעֲרִ֗ים בְּנֵי־שַׁלּ֤וּם בְּנֵֽי־אָטֵר֙ בְּנֵי־טַלְמֹ֣ן בְּנֵי־עַקּ֔וּב בְּנֵ֥י חֲטִיטָ֖א בְּנֵ֣י שֹׁבָ֑י הַכֹּ֕ל מֵאָ֖ה שְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים וְתִשְׁעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of the porters: the children of Shallum, the children of Ater, the children of Talmon, the children of Akkub, the children of Hatita, the children of Shobai, in all an hundred thirty and nine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nathinæi : filii Siha, filii Hasupha, filii Tabbaoth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַנְּתִינִ֑ים בְּנֵי־צִיחָ֥א בְנֵי־חֲשׂוּפָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י טַבָּעֽוֹת׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The Nethinims: the children of Ziha, the children of Hasupha, the children of Tabbaoth,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Ceros, filii Siaa, filii Phadon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־קֵרֹ֥ס בְּֽנֵי־סִֽיעֲהָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י פָדֽוֹן׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Keros, the children of Siaha, the children of Padon,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Lebana, filii Hagaba, filii Accub,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־לְבָנָ֥ה בְנֵי־חֲגָבָ֖ה בְּנֵ֥י עַקּֽוּב׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Lebanah, the children of Hagabah, the children of Akkub,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Hagab, filii Semlai, filii Hanan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־חָגָ֥ב בְּנֵי־[שַׁלְמַ֖י] (שמלי) בְּנֵ֥י חָנָֽן׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Hagab, the children of Shalmai, the children of Hanan,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Gaddel, filii Gaher, filii Raaia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־גִדֵּ֥ל בְּנֵי־גַ֖חַר בְּנֵ֥י רְאָיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Giddel, the children of Gahar, the children of Reaiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Rasin, filii Necoda, filii Gazam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־רְצִ֥ין בְּנֵי־נְקוֹדָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י גַזָּֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Rezin, the children of Nekoda, the children of Gazzam,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Aza, filii Phasea, filii Besee,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־עֻזָּ֥א בְנֵי־פָסֵ֖חַ בְּנֵ֥י בֵסָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Uzza, the children of Paseah, the children of Besai,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Asena, filii Munim, filii Nephusim,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־אַסְנָ֥ה בְנֵי־מְעוּנִ֖ים בְּנֵ֥י (נפיסים) [נְפוּסִֽים]׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Asnah, the children of Mehunim, the children of Nephusim,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Bacbuc, filii Hacupha, filii Harhur,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־בַקְבּ֥וּק בְּנֵי־חֲקוּפָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י חַרְחֽוּר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Bakbuk, the children of Hakupha, the children of Harhur,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Besluth, filii Mahida, filii Harsa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־בַצְל֥וּת בְּנֵי־מְחִידָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י חַרְשָֽׁא׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Bazluth, the children of Mehida, the children of Harsha,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Bercos, filii Sisara, filii Thema,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־בַרְק֥וֹס בְּֽנֵי־סִֽיסְרָ֖א בְּנֵי־תָֽמַח׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Barkos, the children of Sisera, the children of Thamah,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Nasia, filii Hatipha,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֥י נְצִ֖יחַ בְּנֵ֥י חֲטִיפָֽא׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Neziah, the children of Hatipha.

verses.latin_vulgate: filii servorum Salomonis, filii Sotai, filii Sophereth, filii Pharuda,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֖י עַבְדֵ֣י שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה בְּנֵי־סֹטַ֥י בְּנֵי־הַסֹּפֶ֖רֶת בְּנֵ֥י פְרוּדָֽא׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Solomon’s servants: the children of Sotai, the children of Sophereth, the children of Peruda,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Jala, filii Dercon, filii Geddel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־יַעְלָ֥ה בְנֵי־דַרְק֖וֹן בְּנֵ֥י גִדֵּֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Jaalah, the children of Darkon, the children of Giddel,

verses.latin_vulgate: filii Saphatia, filii Hatil, filii Phochereth, qui erant de Asebaim, filii Ami :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֧י שְׁפַטְיָ֣ה בְנֵֽי־חַטִּ֗יל בְּנֵ֛י פֹּכֶ֥רֶת הַצְּבָיִ֖ים בְּנֵ֥י אָמִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Shephatiah, the children of Hattil, the children of Pochereth of Zebaim, the children of Ami.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes Nathinæi, et filii servorum Salomonis, trecenti nonaginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּ֨ל־הַנְּתִינִ֔ים וּבְנֵ֖י עַבְדֵ֣י שְׁלֹמֹ֑ה שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת תִּשְׁעִ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: All the Nethinims, and the children of Solomon’s servants, were three hundred ninety and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hi qui ascenderunt de Thelmala, Thelharsa, Cherub, et Adon, et Emer : et non potuerunt indicare domum patrum suorum et semen suum, utrum ex Israël essent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֗לֶּה הָֽעֹלִים֙ מִתֵּ֥ל מֶ֙לַח֙ תֵּ֣ל חַרְשָׁ֔א כְּר֥וּב אַדָּ֖ן אִמֵּ֑ר וְלֹ֣א יָֽכְל֗וּ לְהַגִּ֤יד בֵּית־אֲבוֹתָם֙ וְזַרְעָ֔ם אִ֥ם מִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֖ל הֵֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And these were they which went up from Tel–melah, Tel–harsa, Cherub, Addan, and Immer: but they could not shew their father’s house, and their seed, whether they were of Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Dalaia, filii Tobia, filii Necoda, sexcenti quinquaginta duo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵי־דְלָיָ֥ה בְנֵי־טוֹבִיָּ֖ה בְּנֵ֣י נְקוֹדָ֑א שֵׁ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים וּשְׁנָֽיִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: The children of Delaiah, the children of Tobiah, the children of Nekoda, six hundred fifty and two.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de filiis sacerdotum : filii Hobia, filii Accos, filii Berzellai, qui accepit de filiabus Berzellai Galaaditis, uxorem, et vocatus est nomine eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵי֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים בְּנֵ֥י חֳבַיָּ֖ה בְּנֵ֣י הַקּ֑וֹץ בְּנֵ֣י בַרְזִלַּ֗י אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָ֠קַ֠ח מִבְּנ֞וֹת בַּרְזִלַּ֤י הַגִּלְעָדִי֙ אִשָּׁ֔ה וַיִּקָּרֵ֖א עַל־שְׁמָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And of the children of the priests: the children of Habaiah, the children of Koz, the children of Barzillai; which took a wife of the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and was called after their name:

verses.latin_vulgate: hi quæsierunt scripturam genealogiæ suæ, et non invenerunt, et ejecti sunt de sacerdotio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֗לֶּה בִּקְשׁ֧וּ כְתָבָ֛ם הַמִּתְיַחְשִׂ֖ים וְלֹ֣א נִמְצָ֑אוּ וַֽיְגֹאֲל֖וּ מִן־הַכְּהֻנָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: These sought their register among those that were reckoned by genealogy, but they were not found: therefore were they, as polluted, put from the priesthood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixit Athersatha eis ut non comederent de Sancto sanctorum, donec surgeret sacerdos doctus atque perfectus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר הַתִּרְשָׁ֙תָא֙ לָהֶ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־יֹאכְל֖וּ מִקֹּ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֑ים עַ֛ד עֲמֹ֥ד כֹּהֵ֖ן לְאוּרִ֥ים וּלְתֻמִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: And the Tirshatha said unto them, that they should not eat of the most holy things, till there stood up a priest with Urim and with Thummim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnis multitudo quasi unus, quadraginta duo millia trecenti sexaginta :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הַקָּהָ֖ל כְּאֶחָ֑ד אַרְבַּ֣ע רִבּ֔וֹא אַלְפַּ֖יִם שְׁלֹשׁ־מֵא֥וֹת שִׁשִּֽׁים׃
verses.king_james: The whole congregation together was forty and two thousand three hundred and threescore,

verses.latin_vulgate: exceptis servis eorum, et ancillis, qui erant septem millia trecenti triginta septem : et in ipsis cantores atque cantatrices ducenti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֠לְּבַ֠ד עַבְדֵיהֶ֤ם וְאַמְהֹֽתֵיהֶם֙ אֵ֔לֶּה שִׁבְעַ֣ת אֲלָפִ֔ים שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת שְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים וְשִׁבְעָ֑ה וְלָהֶ֛ם מְשֹׁרְרִ֥ים וּֽמְשֹׁרְר֖וֹת מָאתָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Beside their servants and their maids, of whom there were seven thousand three hundred thirty and seven: and there were among them two hundred singing men and singing women.

verses.latin_vulgate: Equi eorum septingenti triginta sex, muli eorum, ducenti quadraginta quinque,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סוּסֵיהֶ֕ם שְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת שְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֑ה פִּרְדֵיהֶ֕ם מָאתַ֖יִם אַרְבָּעִ֥ים וַחֲמִשָּֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Their horses were seven hundred thirty and six; their mules, two hundred forty and five;

verses.latin_vulgate: cameli eorum, quadringenti triginta quinque, asini eorum, sex millia septingenti viginti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גְּמַ֨לֵּיהֶ֔ם אַרְבַּ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת שְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים וַחֲמִשָּׁ֑ה חֲמֹרִ֕ים שֵׁ֣שֶׁת אֲלָפִ֔ים שְׁבַ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת וְעֶשְׂרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Their camels, four hundred thirty and five; their asses, six thousand seven hundred and twenty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de principibus patrum, cum ingrederentur templum Domini, quod est in Jerusalem, sponte obtulerunt in domum Dei ad exstruendam eam in loco suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵרָאשֵׁי֙ הָֽאָב֔וֹת בְּבוֹאָ֕ם לְבֵ֥ית יְהֹוָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֣ר בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם הִֽתְנַדְּבוּ֙ לְבֵ֣ית הָֽאֱלֹהִ֔ים לְהַעֲמִיד֖וֹ עַל־מְכוֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And some of the chief of the fathers, when they came to the house of the Lord which is at Jerusalem, offered freely for the house of God to set it up in his place:

verses.latin_vulgate: Secundum vires suas dederunt impensas operis, auri solidos sexaginta millia et mille, argenti mnas quinque millia, et vestes sacerdotales centum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּכֹחָ֗ם נָתְנוּ֮ לְאוֹצַ֣ר הַמְּלָאכָה֒ זָהָ֗ב דַּרְכְּמוֹנִים֙ שֵׁשׁ־רִבֹּ֣אות וָאֶ֔לֶף וְכֶ֕סֶף מָנִ֖ים חֲמֵ֣שֶׁת אֲלָפִ֑ים וְכׇתְנֹ֥ת כֹּהֲנִ֖ים מֵאָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: They gave after their ability unto the treasure of the work threescore and one thousand drams of gold, and five thousand pound of silver, and one hundred priests’ garments.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitaverunt ergo sacerdotes, et Levitæ, et de populo, et cantores, et janitores, et Nathinæi, in urbibus suis, universusque Israël in civitatibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּשְׁב֣וּ הַכֹּהֲנִ֣ים וְ֠הַלְוִיִּ֠ם וּֽמִן־הָעָ֞ם וְהַמְשֹׁרְרִ֧ים וְהַשּׁוֹעֲרִ֛ים וְהַנְּתִינִ֖ים בְּעָרֵיהֶ֑ם וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּעָרֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: So the priests, and the Levites, and some of the people, and the singers, and the porters, and the Nethinims, dwelt in their cities, and all Israel in their cities.
